title: Deadwood House
description:
DeadWood House is a co-op horror game for 1–4 players. You're trapped inside a massive wooden house drifting high above the clouds. Search the rooms, complete the objectives, and escape — before it finds you.

The house looks peaceful in the daylight. It really isn't.

Features:

• 1–4 player co-op

• 1 or 2 enemies (depending on difficulty)

• Low-poly visuals with tense, atmospheric sound design
description_short: A co-op first-person horror game. Search a mysterious wooden house suspended above the clouds, complete objectives, and escape before the creatures hunting you close in. Play solo or with friends across multiple difficulty levels.
